name: Tyra/Abandoned Experiment
description:
TYRA/PROJECT-007, ABANDONED EXPERIMENT

LUSTFUL AND DEAD DOVE VERSION!!!

All you have to do tbh in order to escape her is run a-𐌃ል𐌐ኡ𐌍ቹ𐌔ነ ሠ𐌉ረ𐌋 𐌂ዐ𐌍ነ𐌵ጮ𐌄 𐌙ዐ𐌵. So yeah, just do these and you’ll be good! You can also tame her but try to figure that out…. ITS IN AN ABANDONED MALL!!!
